title: hordeum pusillum
intro: Hordeum pusillum, also known as little barley or small barley, is a small annual grass native to North America. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include its ability to reduce inflammation and act as an antiseptic. The plant's health benefits include its potential to lower blood sugar levels and reduce fever, making it a sought-after ingredient in herbal remedies. Hordeum pusillum can be prepared into various herbal preparations, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat a range of health issues.
